languages.text: {n}Гудение в механических органах техножреца затихает, оставляя вас в погребальной тишине. Вся фигура Экзальта-117 на миг становится неподвижным, мертвым механизмом.{/n} "Это объясняет ограниченность карты воспоминаний. Ложность инфо-разметки. Дисфункцию. Пути, благодаря которым такое возможно, лежат за пределами моих контуров знания. Но я благодарю вас за уточнение координат".

{n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."
languages.original_text: {n}Гудение в механических органах техножреца затихает, оставляя вас в погребальной тишине. Пути, благодаря которым такое возможно, лежат за пределами моих контуров знания. Но я благодарю вас за уточнение координат".

The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."

For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."

languages.text: {n}技术神甫机械器官的嗡鸣声逐渐消失，四周陷入死寂之中。有那么一刻，尊使-117仿佛变成了一件无法动弹、毫无生机的机械。{/n}“这解释了我记忆图谱的局限性，数据索引的虚假，以及系统失调。这种情况为何会发生，已超出我认知回路的范畴。但我感谢你替我校正了坐标。”
languages.original_text: {n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫机械器官的嗡鸣声逐渐消失，四周陷入死寂之中。有那么一刻，尊使-117仿佛变成了一件无法动弹、毫无生机的机械。{/n}“这解释了我记忆图谱的局限性，数据索引的虚假，以及系统失调。这种情况为何会发生，已超出我认知回路的范畴。但我感谢你替我校正了坐标。”

languages.text: {n}Le bourdonnement produit par les organes mécaniques du technoprêtre se tait. Figé dans le silence sépulcral, Exalt-117 semble mort jusqu'à ce qu'il reprenne la parole.{/n} « Voilà qui explique les limitations de ma carte mémorielle, les erreurs de l'index de données, le dysfonctionnement. L'explication d'un tel phénomène n'est pas comprise dans mes circuits de connaissance, mais je vous remercie d'avoir clarifié les coordonnées. »
languages.original_text: {n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le bourdonnement produit par les organes mécaniques du technoprêtre se tait. Figé dans le silence sépulcral, Exalt-117 semble mort jusqu'à ce qu'il reprenne la parole.{/n} « Voilà qui explique les limitations de ma carte mémorielle, les erreurs de l'index de données, le dysfonctionnement. L'explication d'un tel phénomène n'est pas comprise dans mes circuits de connaissance, mais je vous remercie d'avoir clarifié les coordonnées. »

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip'in mekanik organlarından çıkan uğultu dinip seni ölümcül bir sessizlikle baş başa bırakıyor. Yüce-117; bir an için hareketsiz, ölü bir mekanizmaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Bu tez, hafıza haritamın kısıtlamalarını açıklıyor. Veri dizininin yanlışlığını ve işlev bozukluğunu da. Böyle bir şeyin nasıl mümkün olabildiği, irfan devrelerimin ötesinde. Fakat koordinatları netleştirdiğiniz için teşekkür ederim."
languages.original_text: {n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip'in mekanik organlarından çıkan uğultu dinip seni ölümcül bir sessizlikle baş başa bırakıyor. Yüce-117; bir an için hareketsiz, ölü bir mekanizmaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Bu tez, hafıza haritamın kısıtlamalarını açıklıyor. Veri dizininin yanlışlığını ve işlev bozukluğunu da. Böyle bir şeyin nasıl mümkün olabildiği, irfan devrelerimin ötesinde. Fakat koordinatları netleştirdiğiniz için teşekkür ederim."

languages.text: {n}El zumbido de los órganos mecánicos del tecnosacerdote se apaga, sumiéndoos en un silencio sepulcral. Por un momento, Exaltado-117 se convierte en un mecanismo inmóvil e inerte.{/n} «Esto explica las limitaciones de mi mapa de memoria. La falsedad del índice de datos. Los errores. La forma de lograr tal resultado está más allá de mis circuitos de conocimiento, pero le agradezco que haya compartido las coordenadas».
languages.original_text: {n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."

traits.locale_text: {n}El zumbido de los órganos mecánicos del tecnosacerdote se apaga, sumiéndoos en un silencio sepulcral. Por un momento, Exaltado-117 se convierte en un mecanismo inmóvil e inerte.{/n} «Esto explica las limitaciones de mi mapa de memoria. La falsedad del índice de datos. Los errores. La forma de lograr tal resultado está más allá de mis circuitos de conocimiento, pero le agradezco que haya compartido las coordenadas».

languages.text: {n}Das Summen in den mechanischen Organen des Techpriesters verstummt und lässt dich in einer düsteren Stille zurück. Für einen kurzen Moment wird Exalt-117 zu einem regungslosen, toten Mechanismus.{/n} "Das erklärt die Einschränkungen meiner Speicherbänke. Die Falschheit des Datenindex. Die Dysfunktion. Die Wege, ein solches Ding möglich zu machen, liegen außerhalb meiner Wissensbanken. Aber danke für die Abklärung der Koordinaten."
languages.original_text: {n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Summen in den mechanischen Organen des Techpriesters verstummt und lässt dich in einer düsteren Stille zurück. Für einen kurzen Moment wird Exalt-117 zu einem regungslosen, toten Mechanismus.{/n} "Das erklärt die Einschränkungen meiner Speicherbänke. Die Falschheit des Datenindex. Die Dysfunktion. Die Wege, ein solches Ding möglich zu machen, liegen außerhalb meiner Wissensbanken. Aber danke für die Abklärung der Koordinaten."

languages.text: {n}テクプリストの機械的な器官の唸りが消え、あなたは墓地のような静けさに包まれる。一瞬、エクサルト117は動かない、死んだ機械となる。{/n} 「これが私の記憶地図の限界を説明している。データインデックスの偽り。機能不全。このようなことが可能になる方法は、私の知識回路を超えている。しかし、座標を明確にしてくれてありがとう。」
languages.original_text: {n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."
